name: Dispatch Routes
description: Ordered routing table. Each route pairs a FILTER (Personize filter conditions JSON) with a target operation or subagent. Dispatcher evaluates routes in ascending priority order; first match claims the entity for that dispatch cycle.

properties.description: Evaluation order. Lower number = higher priority. Routes with the same priority are evaluated in creation order.
What this route does and when it fires.
Set to false to disable without deleting. Default: true.
JSON string of CompiledFilter shape: { collection, conditions: [{propertyName, operator, value}], limit, logic }.
What the dispatcher calls when this route matches: a registered operation, a Personize subagent, or a task creation.
Operation name (e.g. 'analyze.reply-sentiment'), subagent name, or task_type value.
Name of the guideline/instruction document to pass to the subagent. Leave empty to let the subagent use its own defaults.
Maximum entities to dispatch via this route per cycle. Default: 50.
When this route was last modified.
